fixes.title: Extract the lambda body into a top-level function that takes 'result' explicitly, and reference that function from the contract
Restructure the ensures to not need per-element access to 'result' (e.g. compare aggregate properties: 'result.length == products.length')
Known v0.4 limitation: ensures that mix per-element lambda predicates with 'result' are not expressible

message: 'result' is not accessible from lambda bodies; it is bound only at the ensures clause level
